lines.english: He Himself grants His Grace;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਲੇਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak so sevak gur kee mat lee |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, that selfless servant lives the Guru's Teachings. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੀਸ ਬਿਸਵੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: bees bisave gur kaa man maanai |
lines.english: One who obeys the Guru's Teachings one hundred per cent

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: so satigur jis ridai har naau |
lines.english: The True Guru's Heart is filled with the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਬਾਰ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anik baar gur kau bal jaau |
lines.english: So many times, I am a sacrifice to the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: so sevak paramesur kee gat jaanai |
lines.english: that selfless servant comes to know the state of the Transcendent Lord.
Twenty-four hours a day, He is imbued with the Love of the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਮਹਿ ਜਨੁ ਜਨ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: braham meh jan jan meh paarabraham |
lines.english: The servant is in God, and God is in the servant.
He is the treasure of everything, the Giver of life.
O Nanak, such a Guru is obtained by the greatest good fortune. ||3||
By thousands of clever tricks, He is not found.
He Himself is One - there is no doubt about this.
Touching His Feet, one's conduct and lifestyle become pure.
Abiding in His Company, one chants the Lord's Praise,
Blessed is His Darshan; receiving it, one is purified.
and reaches the Court of the Supreme Lord God.
The mind is contented, and the soul is fulfilled.
Listening to His Teachings, one's ears are satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਅਖੵਓ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਮੰਤ੍ਰ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa gur akhayo jaa kaa mantr |
lines.english: The Guru is perfect; His Teachings are everlasting.
Beholding His Ambrosial Glance, one becomes saintly.
Endless are His virtuous qualities; His worth cannot be appraised.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak jis bhaavai tis le milaae |4|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who pleases Him is united with Him. ||4||
The tongue is one, but His Praises are many.
The True Lord, of perfect perfection
- no speech can take the mortal to Him.
God is Inaccessible, Incomprehensible, balanced in the state of Nirvaanaa.
He is not sustained by food; He has no hatred or vengeance; He is the Giver of peace.
Nanak is forever a sacrifice to the True Guru;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee keemat kinai na paaee |
lines.english: No one can estimate His worth.
Countless devotees continually bow in reverence to Him.
In their hearts, they meditate on His Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਜਨੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu har ras paavai jan koe |
lines.english: Only a few obtain this ambrosial essence of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਐਸਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਪਨੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak jis prasaad aisaa prabh japane |5|
lines.english: by His Grace, he meditates on God. ||5||
Drinking in this Nectar, one becomes immortal.
By the treasure of excellence, never dies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸੁ ਪੁਰਖ ਕਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਦੇ ਬਿਨਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: aus purakh kaa naahee kade binaas |
lines.english: That person whose mind is illuminated

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har kaa naam lee |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, he takes the Name of the Lord.
The Lord gives true instruction to His servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: man meh raakhai har har ek |
lines.english: In his mind, he cherishes the One Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਲੇਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: moh maaeaa kai sang na lep |
lines.english: He is not polluted by emotional attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਰਮ ਮੋਹ ਦੁਖ ਤਹ ਤੇ ਨਾਸੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak bharam moh dukh teh te naase |6|
lines.english: O Nanak, doubt, emotional attachment and pain are erased. ||6||
In the pitch darkness, a lamp shines forth.
In the burning heat, a soothing coolness prevails.
by the perfect Teachings of the Holy Saint.
Happiness ensues and pain departs, O Siblings of Destiny.
Fear is lifted, and one abides in fearlessness.
The fear of birth and death is dispelled,
In the Company of the Holy, chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਾ ਤਿਨਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis kaa saa tin kirapaa dhaaree |
lines.english: He takes us into His favor as His own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਖੈ ਨਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: sagal biaadh man te khai nase |
lines.english: All evils are dispelled from the mind.
He Himself is absolute and unrelated; He Himself is also involved and related.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sun naanak har har jas sravan |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, listening with one's ears to the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har. ||7||
Stability is attained; doubt and wandering cease,
Manifesting His power, He fascinates the entire world.
God Himself sets His play in motion.
Only He Himself can estimate His worth.
Permeating all, He is the One.
He is revealed in the Company of the Holy.
Through and through, He pervades in form and color.
There is none, other than the Lord.
